query_title: Dawn Breaks, Which Is No Small Thing

recommendations.title: Borat Subsequent Moviefilm: Delivery of Prodigious Bribe to American Regime for Make Benefit Once Glorious Nation of Kazakhstan
recommendations.overview: 14 years after making a film about his journey across the USA, Borat risks life and limb when he returns to the United States with his young daughter, and reveals more about the culture, the COVID-19 pandemic, and the political elections.

recommendations.title: Reality
recommendations.overview: Augusta, Georgia, United States, June 3, 2017. After running some errands, Reality Winner returns home, where she is approached by two men.

recommendations.title: JCVD

recommendations.title: 13th
recommendations.overview: An in-depth look at the prison system in the United States and how it reveals the nation's history of racial inequality.

recommendations.title: Bomb Scared
recommendations.overview: Somewhere in Spain, four ETA terrorists await a phone call before carrying out a mission, while the 2010 FIFA World Cup, where Spanish soccer team is one of the favorites to win, is being held in South Africa.

recommendations.title: I Am Not Your Negro
recommendations.overview: Working from the text of James Baldwin’s unfinished final novel, director Raoul Peck creates a meditation on what it means to be Black in the United States.

recommendations.title: English Vinglish
recommendations.overview: In the United States for the first time, an Indian housewife with a limited command of English turns Manhattan into her personal language school.

recommendations.title: Good Day, Ramon
recommendations.overview: After five failed attempts to go to the United States, 18-year-old Ramón decides to look for a friend’s aunt in Germany, but never finds her. With no papers or money, and without knowing the language, he barely survives living on the street until he

recommendations.title: The Oath
recommendations.overview: In a politically-divided United States, a man struggles to make it through the Thanksgiving holiday without destroying his family.

recommendations.title: It's Now or Never
recommendations.overview: Narrates the preparation for a wedding of a Spanish couple in which everything goes wrong.
